title: Block access to dashboard when not authenticated
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated visitor cannot access the dashboard route and is redirected to authentication.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to the login page or shown an authentication prompt

title: Log in as Patient and see patient dashboard
description: Verifies that a user can select the Patient role, log in, and see the Patient dashboard render.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard with the Patient portal visible

title: Persist logged-in session across refresh
description: Verifies that an authenticated session persists client-side so a refresh keeps the user on the correct role dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user remains on the dashboard with the Patient portal visible

title: Doctor can log in and access the dashboard
description: Verifies a doctor can select the Doctor role, log in, and land on the dashboard with doctor portal content visible.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify doctor-specific dashboard content is displayed

title: Technician can log in and access the dashboard
description: Verifies a technician can select the Technician role, log in, and land on the dashboard with technician portal content visible.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify technician-specific dashboard content is displayed

title: Admin can log in and access the dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can select the Admin role, log in, and land on the dashboard with admin portal navigation visible.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify admin-specific dashboard content is displayed

title: Log in as Doctor and see doctor dashboard
description: Verifies that a user can select the Doctor role, log in, and see the Doctor dashboard render.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard with the Doctor portal visible

title: Sign up as a new user and land on the correct role dashboard
description: Verifies that a new user can sign up after selecting a role and is routed to the dashboard for that role.

steps.description: Fill a valid name into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the phone field
Fill a new unique email into the email field
Fill a valid password into the password field
Fill the same password into the confirm password field
Verify the user lands on the dashboard with the Patient portal visible

title: Technician can submit a scan for AI analysis and view results
description: Verifies a technician can enter patient metadata, upload a valid fundus image, submit for analysis, and see AI results including probabilities, severity, confidence, original image, and heatmap.

steps.description: Open the technician upload workflow from the dashboard
Fill valid patient metadata into the required fields
Select a valid fundus image file in the upload control
Verify AI analysis results are displayed including severity, confidence, and per-disease probabilities
Verify the original image and an explainability heatmap are displayed

title: Doctor can review a pending scan with overlay toggle and submit a decision
description: Verifies a doctor can open a pending scan, view original and heatmap, toggle vessel overlay, record a decision with notes, submit, and see the scan removed from the pending list.

steps.description: Select a pending scan from the pending list
Fill clinical notes into the notes field
Verify the reviewed scan is removed from the pending list
Verify a review submission confirmation is visible

title: Doctor can modify severity and notes when choosing Modify
description: Verifies choosing Modify allows changing severity and entering notes, and submitting records the updated assessment on the dashboard.

steps.description: Select a pending scan from the pending list
Fill clinical notes into the notes field
Verify the scan assessment view reflects the updated decision and severity
Verify the scan is no longer shown as pending

title: Navigate from landing page to role-based login
description: Verifies that a visitor can review the landing content and start onboarding by navigating from the landing page to the login page.

steps.description: Scroll to the section explaining how the AI workflow works
Scroll to the section describing disease coverage and metrics
Click the get started call to action
Verify the user lands on the login page

title: Admin can add a user and see it in the user list
description: Verifies an admin can open User Management, add a new user with required fields, and see the new user appear in the list.

steps.description: Open the user management section from the dashboard
Fill a new name into the name field
Fill a unique email into the email field
Fill a phone number into the phone field
Select a role for the new user
Verify the new user appears in the user list
Verify the user list count increases or reflects the newly added entry

title: View scan details from scan history
description: Verifies that a patient can open a scan from the scan history list and view the AI summary and doctor notes.

steps.description: Select a scan from the scan history list
Verify scan details show an AI diagnosis summary and doctor notes

title: Book an appointment and see confirmation
description: Verifies that a patient can book an appointment by selecting a specialty and time slot and then sees a booking confirmation in the portal.

steps.description: Open the appointment booking workflow from the dashboard
Verify a booking confirmation is visible in the Patient portal

title: Download PDF report from scan details
description: Verifies that a patient can initiate a PDF report download from a scan detail view.

steps.description: Select a scan from the scan history list
Initiate the report download from the scan details view
Verify a PDF report download is initiated

title: Admin can view analytics tiles and charts
description: Verifies the admin analytics view displays key metric tiles and renders volume/performance visualizations.

steps.description: Open the admin analytics section from the dashboard
Verify key metric tiles are displayed for platform analytics
Verify screening volume and model performance charts are displayed

title: Admin can filter users by role and toggle active state
description: Verifies role filtering narrows the user list and toggling a user's active status updates the list state accordingly.

steps.description: Open the user management section from the dashboard
Select a role in the role filter control
Toggle the active state for one user in the filtered list
Verify the user list reflects the selected role filter
Verify the toggled user's active status is updated in the list

title: Reject profile update when passwords do not match
description: Verifies that saving profile changes with mismatched password and confirmation is blocked and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Open the profile edit view from the Patient dashboard
Fill a new password into the password field
Fill a different password into the confirm password field
Verify a password confirmation validation error is visible

title: Technician sees client-side validation error for unsupported file type
description: Verifies selecting an unsupported image MIME type is rejected with a visible validation error and the scan cannot be submitted.

steps.description: Open the technician upload workflow from the dashboard
Fill valid patient metadata into the required fields
Select a file with an unsupported MIME type in the upload control
Verify a file validation error is visible
Verify the scan cannot be submitted for analysis

title: Show email format validation on login
description: Verifies that entering an invalid email format on the login form shows an email validation error and prevents login.

steps.description: Fill invalid-email-format into the email field
Fill any-password into the password field
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Technician is prevented from submitting when required metadata is missing
description: Verifies the upload workflow blocks submission and shows validation when required patient metadata is not provided.

steps.description: Open the technician upload workflow from the dashboard
Select a valid fundus image file in the upload control
Attempt to submit the scan for analysis without completing required metadata
Verify required-field validation errors are visible
Verify the scan is not submitted for analysis
